memoryArtifacts.headline: Calverley William and Agnes Tempest marriage record in Calverley Charters 1442 pg 251
memoryArtifacts.description:
Charter #348  pg 251
Indenture made between Sir John Tempest, knight, of the one part, and Walter Calverley, esquire, of the other part, being an agreement for the marriage of William Calverley, son and heir apparent of Walter and Agnes Tempest, daughter of Sir John. (before the Pentecost next). It also names Walter's wife as Elisabeth and his father as Sir Walter Calverley, knight. It names William's brothers as Thomas and Robert.

zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Tempest於大約1402年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，他的父親Sir Piers Tempest22歲，母親Grace Hebden26歲。他於大約1420年與Dame Alice Sherburne在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1456年在英國林可爾史爾被列為sheriff of lincolnshire。他去世於從1463年11月29日到1464年2月8日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Tempest于大约1402年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，他的父亲Sir Piers Tempest22岁，母亲Grace Hebden26岁。他于大约1420年与Dame Alice Sherburne在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1456年在英国林可爾史爾被列为sheriff of lincolnshire。他去世于从1463年11月29日到1464年2月8日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Tempest was born about 1402, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Piers Tempest, was 22 and his mother, Grace Hebden, was 26. He married Dame Alice Sherburne about 1420, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1456, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as sheriff of lincolnshire in Lincolnshire, England. He died from 29 November 1463 to 8 February 1464, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Tempest est né environ 1402, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Piers Tempest, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Grace Hebden, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Dame Alice Sherburne environ 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1456, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of lincolnshire à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé du 29 novembre 1463 au 8 février 1464, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Tempest um 1402 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Piers Tempest 22 und seine Mutter Grace Hebden 26. Er hat um 1420 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Dame Alice Sherburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1456, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of lincolnshire in Lincolnshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb von 29. November 1463 bis 8. Februar 1464 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Tempest è nato il circa 1402 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Piers Tempest, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Grace Hebden, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Dame Alice Sherburne circa 1420, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1456, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of lincolnshire nel Lincolnshire, England. Morì da 29 novembre 1463 a 8 febbraio 1464, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempestが約1402年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Piers Tempestは22歳，母Grace Hebdenは26歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでDame Alice Sherburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1456年，55歳の時，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of lincolnshireと記録されている。彼はから1463年11月29日まで1464年2月8日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest(이)가 대략 1402년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Piers Tempest(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Hebden(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Dame Alice Sherburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1456년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 링코실르에서 sheriff of lincolnshire이었다. 그는 1463년 11월 29일부터 1464년 2월 8일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.about 1402–from 29 November 1463 to 8 Fe: aproximadamente 1402–de 29 de novembro de 1463 a 8 de fevereiro de 1464
pt.from 29 November 1463 to 8 February 1464: de 29 de novembro de 1463 a 8 de fevereiro de 1464
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Tempest nasceu aproximadamente 1402, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Piers Tempest, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Grace Hebden, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Alice Sherburne aproximadamente 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1456, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of lincolnshire em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu de 29 de novembro de 1463 a 8 de fevereiro de 1464, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Tempest родился около 1402 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Piers Tempest было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Hebden, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Alice Sherburne около 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1456 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of lincolnshire в местности линколншир, Англия. Он умер с 29 ноября 1463 по 8 февраля 1464 в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Tempest nació aproximadamente 1402, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Piers Tempest, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Grace Hebden, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Dame Alice Sherburne aproximadamente 1420, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1456, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of lincolnshire en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Murió desde 29 de noviembre de 1463 hasta 8 de febrero de 1464, en su pueblo.
